response.overview: # Translation  The story follows Mira (Elisya Sandha), the village's most desirable girl who is in love with Mail (Noki K-Clique), a young villager who greatly respects his elders. However, their relationship is not approved by Mira's father, Encik Sabri (Rosli Rahman Adam). Mail is a hardworking young man who works for Pak Hassan, whom he considers as a father figure. Encik Sabri expects Mira, his only child, to marry Rizal (MK K-Clique), the son of the village chief. Rizal holds a university degree and is set to inherit his father's land and business ventures in the village. In reality, Rizal is a village gangster feared by the young villagers, but he always behaves well in front of adults. Encik Sabri sets a condition for Mail to prepare a dowry of RM51,000 within a month if he wishes to marry Mira. For the sake of love, Mail struggles to accumulate this amount of money in such a short period.

production_companies.name: Tanah Beris Film Production Sdn Bhd

response.title: Oh My Hantaran
